---
name: docs-structure-and-navigation
description: Use this when creating or reorganizing documentation pages, sidebars, or sections for the eventsalsa docs site.
---

When working on documentation structure in this repository:

1. Keep the documentation tree easy to scan and extend.
2. Favor a stable split like:
   - overview / landing
   - getting started
   - component-specific pages
   - project/reference material such as changelog
3. Keep sidebar labels plain and descriptive.
4. Prefer adding concise placeholder pages over inventing detailed content that has not been specified yet.
5. When product information is incomplete, preserve the page structure and leave the prose intentionally light.
6. Keep structure independent from secondary design exports; those are only visual references.
